synopsis:
Issue 5 from Marvel Comics Star Wars (2025) Series
THE PAST RETURNS!
As LUKE, RYNN, HAN and VALANCE race to find a group of stranded traders — they uncover a startling, and deadly, relic from the past — and have to face off against a horde of BATTLE DROIDS! LEIA and MON MOTHMA face an unexpected and powerful attack! Who is the new leader of the Nagai resistance? Cornered on a desolate planet, our heroes are left with one shocking option to survive!
title: Star Wars (2025) #05
